mapper.insert: INSERT INTO semantic_cache (kb_id, query_embedding, query_text, response_text, hit_count, expires_at) VALUES (#{cache.kbId}, #{embedding}::vector, #{cache.queryText}, #{cache.responseText}, 0, #{cache.expiresAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE semantic_cache SET hit_count = hit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
